memoryArtifacts.headline: Betchworth Castle. Surrey, England. Birth place of Anthony Brown (a.k.a. Browne).

popularStory.headline: Standard bearer to Henry VII
popularStory.description: Sir Anthony Browne (29 June 1443 – c. 17 November 1506) was the son of Sir Thomas Browne and Eleanor FitzAlan. He served as standard-bearer to Henry VII, and Lieutenant of Calais.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Anthony Browne於1443年6月29日出生在英國素瑞貝華斯時，他的父親Thomas Browne21歲，母親Lady Eleanor Arundel29歲。他和Lady Lucy Neville至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1506年11月17日之前在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯，埋葬在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Anthony Browne于1443年6月29日出生在英国素瑞貝華斯时，他的父亲Thomas Browne21岁，母亲Lady Eleanor Arundel29岁。他和Lady Lucy Neville至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1506年11月17日之前在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯，埋葬在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Anthony Browne was born on 29 June 1443, in Betchworth, Surrey, England, his father, Thomas Browne, was 21 and his mother, Lady Eleanor Arundel, was 29. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Lady Lucy Neville. He died before 17 November 1506, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, and was buried in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Anthony Browne est né le 29 juin 1443, à Betchworth, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Browne, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Eleanor Arundel, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Lady Lucy Neville. Il est décédé avant 17 novembre 1506, à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, et a été enterré à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Anthony Browne am 29. Juni 1443 in Betchworth, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Browne 21 und seine Mutter Lady Eleanor Arundel 29. Er hatte mit Lady Lucy Neville mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 17. November 1506 in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Anthony Browne è nato il il 29 giugno 1443 nel Betchworth, Surrey, England, il suo padre, Thomas Browne, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Lady Eleanor Arundel, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Lady Lucy Neville. Morì prima del 17 novembre 1506, nel Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, e fu sepolto a Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Anthony Browneが1443年6月29日にイギリススリーベトチウオルスで生まれた時，父Thomas Browneは21歳，母Lady Eleanor Arundelは29歳であった。彼はLady Lucy Nevilleとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1506年11月17日以前にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスで死去し，フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Anthony Browne(이)가 1443년 6월 29일 영국 수리 베트ch워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Browne(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Eleanor Arundel(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Lady Lucy Neville(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1506년 11월 17일 이전 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 사망했으며 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에 묻혔다.

mn.29 June 1443–after 25 September 1505 and: 1443 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 29–1506 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 17–наас өмнө

pt.29 June 1443–after 25 September 1505 and: 29 de junho de 1443–antes 17 de novembro de 1506
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Anthony Browne nasceu em 29 de junho de 1443, em Betchworth, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Browne, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Eleanor Arundel, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Lady Lucy Neville. Ele faleceu antes 17 de novembro de 1506, em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, e foi sepultado em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Anthony Browne родился 29 июня 1443 г. в местности бечворт, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Browne было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Eleanor Arundel, 29. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Lady Lucy Neville. Он умер перед 17 ноябрь 1506 г. в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция и был похоронен в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.29 June 1443–after 25 September 1505 and: 29 de junio de 1443–antes de 17 de noviembre de 1506
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Anthony Browne nació el 29 de junio de 1443, en Betchworth, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Browne, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Eleanor Arundel, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Lady Lucy Neville. Murió antes de 17 de noviembre de 1506, en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, y fue sepultado en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
